loop1.title: PQ Issues KPI Strip (Total Issues / I-THD Events / V-THD Events / PF Gap Feeders / Neutral Stress / Worst I-THD / Worst V-THD)
loop1.note: Showing aggregate event counts and worst-case member values from panel outgoing-feeders; scalar KPI tiles are unbound as no dedicated event-count or worst-case scalar columns exist on this meter.

loop1.title: Harmonics & PQ Timeline
loop1.note: Showing per-panel harmonic and event data from the 24 active outgoing feeders; 5 feeders are dark (no data) and render as honest blanks.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: Showing AI narrative summary — numeric harmonic stats (I-THD, V-THD) are not directly measured by this meter's schema (only compliance flags and current THD % are available, which are used for the narrative but not exposed as scalar stats in this roster config).

loop1.title: Feeder PQ At {period}
loop1.note: Showing I-THD and V-THD for feeders with live harmonic data; V-THD columns (thd_voltage_*) are not logged on this panel's feeders, so V-THD values are omitted.

loop1.title: Signature
loop1.note: Showing current distribution across outgoing feeders; harmonic signature data (THD) is not measured by this panel's aggregate meter.
